description: You are a Research Administrator managing an NSF grant. Using the workbook 'nsf_grant_ledger.xlsx', complete the 'Financial_Report' sheet based on the transaction data in 'General_Ledger' and the category definitions in 'Object_Codes'. Calculate F&A (Indirect Costs) at a rate of 53.0% for all transactions marked as MTDC 'Yes'. For each budget category in the 'Financial_Report', calculate the Direct Costs Expended, F&A Costs Expended, Total Costs Expended, and the Remaining Balance. Save the updated workbook.
